name: Dark
prompt_hint: Use a dark mode theme. Dark background #0f172a, card/section backgrounds #1e293b, accent #8b5cf6 (purple), light text #e2e8f0. Modern dark UI aesthetic with subtle gradients and glow effects on accent elements. Good contrast for readability. Use inline CSS in a <style> tag only — no external CDN, no <script> tags.
print_css: @media print { body { background: #fff !important; color: #1e293b !important; } .dark-card { background: #f8f9fa !important; box-shadow: none !important; } button[id='regenerate'] { display: none !important; } @page { margin: 2cm; size: A4; } }
